ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Aug-11-2025 Off Calendar

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-05-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Yuji Mitani appeared via zoom for Taeko Morioka (petitioner).

The Court stated that once a personal representative is appointed by the court there is no such thing as a request for dismissal of entire probate case. Mr. Matani stated that he cannot confirm the beneficiaries in Japan, that he plans on submitting an inventory and appraisal that will not include the pay on death account, and that He is seeking a new probate referee since the previous one retired. On the Courts own motion, the court shall appoint a new probate referee due to the retirement of the current probate referee. Status of administration is ordered off calendar. Status on close of estate is set for August 11 something tomorrow, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Thompson. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Estate.
Off Calendar May-07-2024 Continued To Nov-26-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-11-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated September 19, 2014 is admitted to probate. Taeko Morika is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May 07, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.. Karen Ann Simons is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: M. Svahlin. Not reported.
